Unlocks qual_margin_{op_of_gr,ebit_of_gr,profit_to_gr}.

EventDrivenBacktester now sources limit-up/down from Tushare stk_limit $up_limit/$down_limit (primary) via Exchange.resolve_limit_prices, with a computed round-half-up band fallback for verified holes (BSE 2021 launch, IPO no-limit days, legacy names). Coverage verified 2008-2026 (2024+ zero holes); values verified on regulatory tiers (>=99.79% on +/-5/10/20/30%, worst window 2021=99.7957%; residual = no-limit sentinel rows [registration-system IPO no-limit days, up_limit~1e6/down_limit~0.01], the pre-2023 main-board IPO first-day +44%/-36% rule, and penny-stock fen-rounding -- all correct). Execution field knowable at session open; no Ref lag required. No on-disk/pipeline change.

Capital-flow review (diag_moneyflow_review.py): full coverage from 2014 (2008 partial 31.5%), clean value sanity (0 negative components, balanced turnover Sbuy~Ssell corr 0.99998), provider parity 0 mismatches. net_mf_amount/net_mf_vol APPROVED but flagged OPAQUE VENDOR NETS (do not reconcile from components; best corr ~0.51/0.55 to main-force net) -> prefer component-derived signals.
